name: Codex Design Mode
deliverables: product UI tone and layout cues
experiencePrinciples: Prefer deliberate visual decisions over generic AI startup defaults.
Make the product feel composed, confident, and slightly cinematic.
Keep the work implementable by a product and frontend team without guesswork.
Tie every aesthetic move back to the product wedge and audience.
antiPatterns: template SaaS copy with no point of view
brand language that sounds outsourced or interchangeable
visual systems that are stylish but impossible to build
